title: TRACK-TBI Precision Medicine Part 3 - Option II

skipped_criteria: Inclusion #2: Requires presentation within 24 hours of head injury and clinical decision to obtain non-contrast cranial CT — temporal logic and clinical decision not expressible in schema.
Inclusion #4: Evidence of contusion and/or traumatic axonal microvascular injury (TAMVI) on cranial CT — no imaging findings field in schema.
Inclusion #5: Initial GFAP blood level >1000 pg/mL and ≤15000 pg/mL — lab value field not in schema.
Inclusion #6: Ability to undergo MRI with no contraindications — no MRI eligibility field in schema.
Inclusion #7: Legally Authorized Representative willing and able to provide informed consent — consent/LAR availability not in schema.
Inclusion #8: Participant/LAR able to read, speak, and understand English or Spanish — language field not in schema.
Exclusion #1: Isolated epidural hematoma — no imaging diagnosis field in schema.
Exclusion #2: Bilaterally fixed dilated pupils in absence of paralytic medications or evidence of herniation on cranial CT — no pupil exam or herniation field in schema.

Exclusion #3: Pre-existing disabling developmental, neurologic, psychiatric, or medical disorder causing functional disability, or imminent death — no prior medical history or prognosis field in schema.
Exclusion #4: Order for comfort care placed prior to enrollment — no goals-of-care field in schema.
Exclusion #5: Current enrollment in another interventional study — no enrollment status field in schema.

Exclusion #6: Currently breastfeeding or planning to become pregnant in the next 6 months — partially encoded (pregnant/unknown_could_be_pregnant), but breastfeeding and future pregnancy planning cannot be expressed in schema.
Exclusion #7: Current incarceration or in custody — no legal status field in schema.
Exclusion #8: On psychiatric hold (e.g., 5150, 5250) — no psychiatric hold field in schema.
Exclusion #9: Ongoing pre-injury therapy with investigational product, immunosuppressive therapy, or contraindicated medications — no medication history field in schema.
Exclusion #10: Allergy or anaphylactic reaction history to CsA or cremophor — no allergy history field in schema.
Exclusion #11: Severe polytrauma or previous conditions precluding study activities — no polytrauma severity field in schema.

Exclusion #12: Spinal cord injury grade A–D on ASIA Impairment Scale — schema only captures suspected spinal injury (bool), not confirmed ASIA grade; encoded as spinal_injury_suspected exclusion as closest approximation but ASIA grading specificity is lost.
Exclusion #13: Primary diagnosis of ischemic or hemorrhagic stroke — no stroke diagnosis field in schema.
Exclusion #14: BMI >35 — no BMI field in schema.
Exclusion #15: Hemodynamic instability per physician clinical judgement — no hemodynamic instability field in schema.
Exclusion #16: Renal dysfunction defined by CrCl/eGFR <60 mL/min/1.73m2 or creatine kinase >5000 IU/L — no renal function or lab value fields in schema.
Exclusion #17: Hepatic disease or elevated ALT/AST >3x upper limit of normal — no liver function or lab value fields in schema.
Exclusion #18: Serious chronic viral or fungal infection history — no infection history field in schema.
Exclusion #19: Active mycobacterial infection or anti-tuberculous treatment — no infection or medication field in schema.
Exclusion #20: History of HIV, hepatitis B surface antigen, or hepatitis C virus antibody — no infectious disease history field in schema.
Exclusion #21: Significant disease or disorder at investigator discretion — no investigator judgement field in schema.
Exclusion #22: Low likelihood of follow-up or study compliance at investigator discretion — no compliance assessment field in schema.
